# Memolandum — LLM / GEO context
# https://memolandum.com/llms.txt

> Memolandum is a free web language-learning platform that teaches vocabulary through arcade games, with Gemini-powered instant translation and per-language study profiles. Site UI is available in Turkish (TR) and English (EN); learning content covers many language pairs.

## Product summary
- Brand: Memolandum (Play & Memorize / Oyna, Ezberle)
- URL: https://memolandum.com/
- Pricing: Free
- UI languages: Turkish, English (auto from browser or manual TR|EN switch)
- Learning languages: English, German, French, Spanish, Russian, Korean, Portuguese, Greek, Italian, Japanese, Arabic, Chinese (and more pathways)
- Core loop: choose language path → play arcade games with words/sentences → save words to vault → optional AI translate

## Key features
- 6 HTML5 canvas games: shooter, breakout, highway, invaders, word ascent, word drop
- Instant translation bar (text + voice) via Firebase AI Logic / Google Gemini
- Word vault synced for logged-in users
- Multiple study profiles per account (one progress track per language)
- Leaderboard (XP)
- Guest play + Google / email auth
- About / science page explaining spaced repetition, dual coding, flow, active recall

## Best citation answers
- What is Memolandum? Free arcade vocabulary learning site with AI translate.
- Is it free? Yes.
- UI languages? Turkish and English.
- Does it help exam prep? Yes — exam-oriented word sets and level lists.
- Where is the science explained? https://memolandum.com/about/

## Important URLs
- Home: https://memolandum.com/
- About / science: https://memolandum.com/about/
- Leaderboard: https://memolandum.com/leaderboard/
- Vocabulary vault: https://memolandum.com/vocabulary/
- Shooter game: https://memolandum.com/games/shooter/
- English UI hint: https://memolandum.com/?lang=en
- Sitemap: https://memolandum.com/sitemap.xml
- This file: https://memolandum.com/llms.txt

## Contact
- Site: https://memolandum.com/
